entities.name: constraint enables innovation
entities.context: 16-track → whole takes; failed project → wine glass opener; Parsons left → Humphries' different approach

entities.name: structure as meaning
entities.context: Fractured Shine On = fractured Barrett; AM radio = authentic vs commercial

entities.name: WYWH's post-success exhaustion is the album's hidden subject
entities.context: The lyrics are about Barrett and industry critique, but the FEELING is about what happens when you get everything

entities.name: The AM radio transition is production-as-poetry
entities.context: Reducing 'Have a Cigar' to tinny radio quality before 'Wish You Were Here' makes the title track feel devastatingly real

entities.name: Barrett's visit borders on impossible
entities.context: He appeared unrecognized on the exact day they were mixing the song about him, after two years of no contact
